message:
fix(bv): suppress spurious 'Error handling --robot-*' on success

dispatchRobotFlagOrExit always printed an "Error handling …" line as long
as the handler hadn't already reported its own error — even on the success
path where the handler returned nil and ExitCode==0. The line was emitted
just before os.Exit(0), so callers got polluted stdout-companion stderr
output for every successful --robot-* invocation. TestCLIFlagCompatibility
caught this by failing on the trailing "\nError handling --robot-next\n"
suffix after otherwise-correct JSON.

Gate the print on (Err != nil || ExitCode != 0) so the banner only fires
when the handler actually failed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
